home.headline: Find local businesses
home.subheadline: Verified business profiles with accurate information about opening hours, contact details, and services.
home.categoriesSubtitle: Browse our categories to find exactly what you need.
home.step1Desc: Use the search bar or browse categories to find the business you need.
home.step2Desc: Read accurate information about opening hours, contact details, and services — no guesswork.
home.step3Desc: Call, email, or visit the business directly from their profile.
home.ctaSubtitle: Create a verified profile and reach thousands of potential customers — simple and free to get started.
home.feature1Desc: Every listing is reviewed and approved by our team before going live.
home.feature2Desc: Business owners keep their own opening hours and contact info current.
home.feature3Desc: Search by name, category, or city. Filter to narrow down exactly what you need.
home.feature4Desc: Finding local businesses on DinLinks is always free — no account needed.
home.ownerBenefit3: Add photos, hours, and contact info
home.ownerBenefit5: Track profile views in your dashboard

about.title: About DinLinks
about.subtitle: We connect local businesses with customers in a simple, modern, and effective way.

vision.heading: Our vision
vision.p1: DinLinks was founded with a simple vision: to make it easier for people to find and contact local businesses in their area.
vision.p2: We believe in supporting local businesses and helping them grow by giving them a modern, professional platform to reach their customers.

search.title: Easy search
search.desc: Find local businesses quickly and easily with our intuitive search system.

platform.title: Modern platform
platform.desc: A professional and user-friendly platform built with the latest technologies.

support.title: Support local businesses
support.desc: Help local businesses grow by making them more visible in your area.

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Whether you're a customer looking for local services, or a business wanting to reach more customers.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or feedback? We'd love to hear from you!

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I register my business?
faq.a1: Click "Register" at the top of the page, fill in the form with your business information, and wait for approval from our team.
faq.q2: Is it free to register my business?
faq.a2: Yes, basic registration is free. We also offer premium packages with extra features and visibility.
faq.q3: How long does it take for my business to be approved?
faq.a3: We process all applications within 1–2 business days. You will receive an email when your business is approved.
faq.q4: Can I edit my business profile after publication?
faq.a4: Yes, you can log in to your dashboard at any time and update your business information.

intro.heading: 1. Introduction
intro.p1: This privacy policy describes how DinLinks ("we", "us" or "our") collects, uses and protects your personal information when you use our platform.
intro.p2: We are committed to protecting your privacy and process all personal data in accordance with applicable privacy legislation, including GDPR.

dataCollection.heading: 2. Information we collect
dataCollection.intro: We collect the following types of information:

dataUse.heading: 3. How we use the information
dataUse.intro: We use your personal information to:
dataUse.item2: Communicate with you about your account and services
dataUse.item4: Ensure platform security and prevent fraud

dataSharing.heading: 4. Sharing of information
dataSharing.text: We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with service providers who help us operate the platform, but only to the extent necessary to deliver our services.

contact.heading: 6. Contact us
contact.text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at

acceptance.heading: 1. Acceptance of terms
acceptance.text: By using DinLinks ("the service") you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. If you do not accept these terms, please do not use the service.

usage.heading: 2. Use of the service
usage.p1: You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, or restrict or inhibit the use of the service by any other party.
usage.p2: You must not use the service in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair the service, or interfere with any other party's use of the service.

accounts.heading: 3. User accounts
accounts.intro: To access certain features of the service, you may be required to create an account. You agree to:
accounts.item1: Provide accurate, complete, and current information
accounts.item2: Maintain the security of your password
accounts.item3: Immediately notify us of unauthorised use of your account

profiles.heading: 4. Business profiles
profiles.intro: If you register a business profile, you agree:
profiles.item1: That all information you provide is true and accurate
profiles.item2: That you have the right to represent the business
profiles.item3: That you will keep the information up to date
profiles.item4: That the profile may be verified before approval

ip.heading: 5. Intellectual property
ip.text: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by DinLinks and are protected by Norwegian and international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws.

disclaimer.heading: 6. Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The service is provided "as is" and "as available" without any form of warranty. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, secure, or error-free.

liability.heading: 7. Limitation of liability
liability.text: DinLinks shall not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss of profits, data, use, or other intangible losses.

changes.heading: 8. Changes to terms
changes.text: We reserve the right to change these terms at any time. We will notify you of changes by publishing the new terms on this page.

contact.heading: 9. Contact us
contact.text: If you have questions about these terms, please contact us at
